terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms govern your use of Lumi, a Sellcast product. By creating an account or using the service you agree to these Terms.

service.heading: The service
service.body: Lumi turns products into short-form videos using AI. Outputs are generated automatically and may vary in quality; you are responsible for reviewing them before publishing.

account.heading: Your account
account.body: You must provide accurate information and keep your account secure. You are responsible for activity under your account.

acceptableUse.heading: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.item1: Don’t use Lumi for unlawful, deceptive, or infringing content.
acceptableUse.item2: Don’t misrepresent products or make false claims.
acceptableUse.item3: Don’t abuse, reverse-engineer, or overload the service.
acceptableUse.item4: Follow the rules of any platform where you publish (e.g. TikTok, Reels).

content.heading: Content & ownership
content.yourBody: You retain rights to the product information and assets you provide. You grant us a license to process them to deliver the service.
content.outputBody: Subject to these Terms and your plan, you may use videos you generate for your commercial purposes. You are responsible for ensuring your use complies with applicable laws and platform policies.

billing.heading: Subscriptions & billing
billing.body: Paid plans are billed in advance on a recurring basis. You can change or cancel anytime; see our <refunds>Refunds policy</refunds> for details.

disclaimers.heading: Disclaimers
disclaimers.body: Lumi is provided “as is.” We don’t guarantee that generated videos will achieve any particular performance or comply with every platform’s evolving rules.

liability.heading: Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the extent permitted by law, Sellcast is not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from your use of Lumi.

termination.heading: Termination
termination.body: You may stop using Lumi at any time. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.

changes.heading: Changes
changes.body: We may update these Terms; material changes will be reflected by the date above and continued use constitutes acceptance.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Lumi, a Sellcast product (“Lumi”, “we”), collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our website and application. By using Lumi you agree to the practices described here.

collect.heading: Information we collect
collect.account: Account data — your phone number, and (if provided) display name, email, and connected sign-in providers.
collect.usage: Usage data — products you browse or save, videos you generate, and the choices you make in the studio.
collect.technical: Technical data — device, browser, IP address, and session information used to keep you signed in and secure.

use.heading: How we use your information
use.item1: To provide, operate, and improve the Lumi service.
use.item2: To generate the videos you request and show your history.
use.item3: To authenticate you and protect against abuse.
use.item4: To communicate service updates and respond to support.

sharing.heading: Sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell your personal information. We share data only with service providers that help us operate Lumi (for example, video and speech model providers, cloud storage, and SMS delivery), and only as needed to provide the service or comply with law.

cookies.heading: Cookies & sessions
cookies.body: We use first-party cookies to keep you signed in and remember your theme preference. We do not use them for cross-site advertising.

retention.heading: Data retention
retention.body: We retain account and content data for as long as your account is active. You can delete your videos at any time, and you may request deletion of your account and associated data.

rights.heading: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your region, you may have rights to access, correct, export, or delete your personal data. Contact us to exercise them.

security.heading: Security
security.body: We use industry-standard measures to protect your data, including encrypted transport and hashed credentials. No method of transmission is perfectly secure, but we work to safeguard your information.

children.heading: Children
children.body: Lumi is not directed to children under 13 (or the minimum age in your jurisdiction), and we do not knowingly collect their data.

changes.heading: Changes
changes.body: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be noted by updating the date above.

refunds.title: Payments & Refunds
refunds.intro: We want you to be happy with Lumi. This policy explains how billing and refunds work.

free.heading: Free plan
free.body: The Free plan lets you generate your first video at no cost and with no credit card, so you can see Lumi work before paying anything.

subscriptions.heading: Subscriptions
subscriptions.body: Paid plans are billed in advance — monthly or annually. You keep access through the end of the period you’ve paid for.

guarantee.heading: 7-day money-back guarantee
guarantee.body: If you’re not satisfied within 7 days of your first paid charge, email us and we’ll refund that charge in full.

annual.heading: Annual plans
annual.body: Annual plans can be refunded on a pro-rated basis within the first 30 days. After that, you keep access until the term ends.

cancellations.heading: Cancellations
cancellations.body: Cancel anytime from your account. Cancellation stops future billing; it doesn’t retroactively refund the current period (except under the guarantee above).

request.heading: How to request a refund
request.body: Email <email>billing@sellcast.ai</email> from your account email with your account details. We typically respond within two business days.

footer.tagline: Lumi turns any product into scroll-stopping shoppable video — grounded in real viral patterns, not guesswork.
footer.copyright: © {year} Sellcast. Lumi is a Sellcast product.
footer.madeFor: Made for sellers who'd rather sell than film.

cta.title: Your next best-seller is one product link away.
cta.subtitle: Make your first scroll-stopping video free — no camera, no editor, no blank page.

faq.q1: How is Lumi different from generic AI video tools?
faq.a1: Lumi doesn't guess. Before it writes a single line, it studies a large sample of real, organic top-performers in your product's category and extracts the structural pattern — hook, proof, and CTA shapes that actually convert. Your script is grounded in that pattern, not a blank page.
faq.q2: Do I need to film anything or be on camera?
faq.a2: No. Choose AI Avatar mode for a presenter-led video, or Product-Only mode for clean showcase footage. Lumi generates the visuals, voice, and captions end-to-end from your product.
faq.q3: Can I review the video before it's fully rendered?
faq.a3: Yes — that's the Beat Review gate. Lumi generates a reference image for every beat (shot) first. You approve or regenerate each one, and only then does it spend render time. Prefer hands-off? Auto-QA approves beats for you.
faq.q4: Which video model does Lumi use?
faq.a4: Lumi renders with Seedance 2.0, tuning the settings per shot. More frontier video models are on the roadmap — your scripts and beats carry over when new models land.
faq.q5: Where does the product data come from?
faq.a5: Paste a link from Amazon, Shopee, TikTok Shop, or your own store — or upload your own product photos — and Lumi reads the title, description, and imagery to build from. Your products stay private to you. Prefer ideas? Browse the built-in marketplace of trending picks.
faq.q6: How long does one video take?
faq.a6: Lumi scripts, storyboards, and renders without you filming or editing — you kick it off and come back to a finished, publish-ready cut. The pattern research for a category is cached, so later videos in that category start even faster.

header.title: Start free. Scale when
header.subtitle: No credit card to begin. Cancel anytime. Annual billing saves about 20%.

pricing.creditFootnote: 1 credit = 1 second of video. Video counts are approximate, based on 20-second clips — a 15s video uses fewer credits, a 30s video more.
included: Paste any product link or browse the marketplace

faq.a1: 1 credit = 1 second of finished video. A 20-second video uses 20 credits; a 30-second one uses 30. You pick the length, and you're only charged for what you render.
faq.a2: No. Regenerating a beat while you review doesn't cost extra — credits only count the final rendered video.
faq.q3: What if I run out of credits?
faq.a3: Upgrade anytime for a bigger monthly allowance — it applies immediately. Credits reset at the start of each billing cycle.
faq.a4: Anytime. Upgrades apply immediately; downgrades take effect next cycle. Annual saves ~20% over monthly.
faq.q5: Which render model does Lumi use?
faq.a5: Lumi renders with Seedance 2.0, with more models rolling out. It picks the best settings per shot.

landing.heroTitle: Turn any product into a <highlight>scroll-stopping</highlight> shoppable video.
landing.heroSubtitle: Paste any product link — Amazon, Shopee, TikTok Shop, or your own store — or upload photos. Lumi studies what's already winning in that category, scripts a video grounded in the pattern, lets you review it beat-by-beat, and renders it with Seedance 2.0. In minutes, no camera.
landing.howSubtitle: Most tools start from nothing. Lumi starts from what's already winning — then keeps you in control all the way to publish.

models.ctaTitle: Render with the best models — without the busywork.

header.title: We help you sell with video —
header.subtitle: Lumi is a Sellcast product. We turn any product into a scroll-stopping shoppable video, grounded in what's already winning.

about.intro1: Short-form video is the storefront now — but most sellers don't have time to film, edit, and test their way to a winner. Generic AI tools fill the gap with content that feels like AI.
about.intro2: Lumi takes a different path. Before writing a script, it studies a large sample of real, organic top-performers in your product's category and learns the structure that converts — then scripts, storyboards, and renders a video you can review beat-by-beat and ship in minutes.

grounded.title: Grounded, not guessing
grounded.body: We learn from what actually converts in a category before we generate a thing.

quality.title: Quality over volume
quality.body: Native-feeling creatives that stop the scroll — not generic AI filler.

control.title: You stay in control
control.body: Review beat-by-beat. Nothing burns render time without your sign-off (unless you want it to).

sellers.title: Built for sellers
sellers.body: Made for people who'd rather sell than film — solo creators to agencies.

about.contact: Want to talk partnerships, press, or enterprise? <email>hello@sellcast.ai</email>

blog.title: The Lumi blog is coming soon
blog.body: Playbooks on viral patterns, hooks that convert, and how top sellers scale short-form video. Be the first to read it.

careers.title: We're building the future of commerce video
careers.body: We're a small team moving fast. No open roles posted yet — but if you're exceptional at AI, video, or growth, we'd love to hear from you.

features.title: Features
features.description: Everything Lumi does — link to video, pattern-grounded scripts, beat-by-beat review, avatar & product modes, auto dialogue QA, captions & publish.

models.title: Models
models.description: Lumi renders with Seedance 2.0 today, with more frontier video models on the way. Each shot gets the settings that render it best.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Start free, scale when it's working. Lumi pricing is credit-based — 1 credit = 1 second of video. Free (first video), Creator, Pro, Scale, and Enterprise. No credit card to begin; annual saves ~20%.

about.title: About
about.description: Lumi is a Sellcast product helping sellers and creators turn products into scroll-stopping shoppable videos — grounded in real viral patterns.
